Bus Timings

F12 Bus Timetable - MAX MS to Al Wasl Park

June 28, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Operational Details

The F12 bus runs frequently throughout the day, ensuring convenient service for all passengers. Here’s the schedule for the F12 bus departing from both the Max Metro Seaside and Wasl Park Terminus:

From Max Metro Seaside From Wasl Park Terminus
05:18 04:34
05:40 05:24
06:00 05:45
06:15 06:05
06:35 06:22
06:52 06:38
07:12 06:51

07:45 07:24
07:56 07:35

08:20 08:00
08:33 08:12
08:45 08:24
08:57 08:36
09:08 08:48

10:10 09:50

Bus F12 Timetable

For the complete timetable, you can visit the official RTA website or check the F12 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Passengers can use the NOL card for seamless, cashless payments on the F12 bus. The fare is AED 2 for single-zone travel, with additional charges for longer distances, allowing for easy top-ups online or at vending machines.

Route Overview

The F12 bus route connects several important stops, catering to both shopping and recreational needs. Key stops along the F12 route include:

  1. Max Metro Seaside: Starting point offering easy access to metro services.

  2. Satwa Roundabout: A bustling hub with shops and local eateries.

  3. Satwa, Masjid: A notable stop for those wishing to visit the local mosque.

  4. Satwa, Clinic: Convenient access for healthcare services.

  5. Hudheiba, Road: A key thoroughfare connecting various neighborhoods.

6.

This route serves as a practical option for daily commuters while also allowing tourists to explore local attractions and neighborhoods.

Accessibility and Services

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Accessibility features include:

  • Wheelchair Ramps for easy boarding.

  • Reserved Seating for individuals with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-Visual Aids to assist passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

These amenities ensure that the F12 is an inclusive transport option for everyone.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

  1. Al Wasl Park: A spacious park ideal for family outings and relaxation.

  2. Satwa Market: A vibrant market where visitors can experience local culture and cuisine.

  3. Jumeira Beach: A short distance from the route, offering scenic views and leisure activities.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip on the F12 bus from MAX Metroside to Al Wasl Park, the passenger experienced a vibrant journey through the heart of the city. The bus passed iconic sights like the towering Burj Khalifa and bustling Dubai Mall, with its famous fountain show, while also navigating the historic Al Fahidi District, known for its traditional wind-tower architecture and the Dubai Museum.

Approaching Al Wasl Park, the lush greenery provided a refreshing contrast to the urban landscape, making it a popular spot for relaxation and community events. Conversations with fellow passengers revealed hidden gems, from charming cafés to lesser-known attractions, turning the ride into a delightful exploration of Dubai’s unique charm.

Travel Tips for Bus F12

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus schedule to avoid peak times and ensure timely departures.

  • Use a NOL Card: This simplifies payment processes for a smooth travel experience across Dubai.
  • Real-Time Updates: Utilize the RTA app for live schedule updates to avoid delays.
  • Travel Off-Peak: For a quieter ride, consider using the bus during off-peak hours.

The F12 bus route provides a dependable and cost-effective means of navigating Dubai, linking major shopping destinations and recreational spots. Jump on the F12 bus to easily discover Dubai’s highlights while benefiting from efficient service throughout the day. For a complete overview of the full Dubai bus route, plan your journey today!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 28, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
